'''rathushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:reactor|reactor]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-th-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:reactor|reactor]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| rathushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræthishith|ræthishith]] || [[word:ræthishij|ræthishij]] || [[word:ræthishish|ræthishish]] || [[word:ræthishi|ræthishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rathuthushuth|rathuthushuth]] || [[word:rathuthushuj|rathuthushuj]] || [[word:rathuthushush|rathuthushush]] || [[word:rathuthushu|rathuthushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rathushuth|rathushuth]] || [[word:rathushuj|rathushuj]] || [[word:rathushush|rathushush]] || [[word:rathushu|rathushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rathufshuth|rathufshuth]] || [[word:rathufshuj|rathufshuj]] || [[word:rathufshush|rathufshush]] || [[word:rathufshuf|rathufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rathushuthu|rathushuthu]] || [[word:rathushuju|rathushuju]] || [[word:rathushushu|rathushushu]] || [[word:rathushuku|rathushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rathushuth|rathushuth]] || [[word:rathushuj|rathushuj]] || [[word:rathushush|rathushush]] || [[word:rathushu|rathushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rathushuthul|rathushuthul]] || [[word:rathushujul|rathushujul]] || [[word:rathushushul|rathushushul]] || [[word:rathushukul|rathushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rathushuthuthu|rathushuthuthu]] || [[word:rathushujuju|rathushujuju]] || [[word:rathushushushu|rathushushushu]] || [[word:rathushuku|rathushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rathushuthun|rathushuthun]] || [[word:rathushujun|rathushujun]] || [[word:rathushushun|rathushushun]] || [[word:rathushukun|rathushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rathushuthuoro|rathushuthuoro]] || [[word:rathushujuoro|rathushujuoro]] || [[word:rathushushuoro|rathushushuoro]] || [[word:rathushukuoro|rathushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
